sql_array: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS train_data(param1 Float64, param2 Float64, target Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE your_model ENGINE = Memory AS SELECT stochasticLinearRegressionState(0.01, 0.1, 10, 'Adam')(target, param1, param2) AS state FROM train_data;
WITH (SELECT state FROM your_model) AS model SELECT evalMLMethod(model, param1, param2) FROM (SELECT 1.0 AS param1, 1.0 AS param2) AS test_data;
SELECT stochasticLinearRegression(0.02)(target, param1, param2) FROM train_data;
